title: Corvus Glaive
content:
{{SomethingElse|the Corvus Glaive [[Variant]] from the [[Cosmic Time Heist Universe|2014 Time Heist]]|Corvus Glaive/Cosmic Time Heist|Corvus Glaive}} {{CharHub|Corvus Glaive|Corvus Glaive}} {{Character |image = Corvus Glaive Infobox.png |real name = Corvus Glaive |species = |gender = Male |DOD = [[2018|May 2018]]{{Ref|AIW}}[[:File:Close-Up Magic Website.png|"4/30/2018" on Scott's laptop in ''Ant-Man and the Wasp'']]{{Ref|MSTMCUAOT}} |affiliation = [[Black Order]] |movie = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)|Guardians of the Galaxy]]'' (indirectly mentioned)
}}''[[Avengers: Infinity War]]''}} |comic = ''[[Avengers: Endgame Prelude]]'' |book = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Look Out for the Little Guy! (novel)|Look Out for the Little Guy!]]'' (mentioned)}}}} |actor = [[Michael Shaw (actor)|Michael Shaw]] |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|I thought you were formidable, machine. But you're dying, like any man.|Corvus Glaive to [[Vision]]|Avengers: Infinity War}} '''Corvus Glaive''' was [[Thanos]]' adoptive son and a member of the [[Black Order]]. He joined his father in his quest for the six [[Infinity Stones]], initially [[Attack on the Statesman|attacked]] the ''[[Statesman]]'' with his siblings and helped to kill half of the [[Asgardians]] aboard and retrieve the [[Space Stone]]. He later [[Attack on Vision|attacked]] [[Vision]] and [[Wanda Maximoff]], almost killing them until the arrival of [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]], [[Sam Wilson|Falcon]] and [[Black Widow]]. Widow wounded him and he and [[Proxima Midnight]] were forced to flee. He later hunted the wounded Vision during the [[Battle of Wakanda]] after Midnight told the [[Avengers]] he had died from his wounds. He attacked Vision and then Captain America, but Vision stabbed him with his own [[Corvus Glaive's Glaive|weapon]] from behind, killing him. ==Biography== ===[[Black Order]]=== ====Becoming a Child of Thanos==== Corvus Glaive, like the rest of the [[Black Order]], was a member of a world destroyed by [[Thanos]] in his quest to wipe out half the universe. Thanos took the orphaned Glaive and raised him as his own child, training him to be a deadly member of the Black Order.{{Ref|AIW}} Unlike [[Ebony Maw]], [[Cull Obsidian]], [[Nebula]], and [[Gamora]], his adoptive siblings, Glaive was able to actually feel love for [[Proxima Midnight]], his wife and fellow adoptive sister.[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fh43gxcu91s Michael James Shaw: Becoming Marvel Infinity War's Villian Corvus Glaive!] As with his fellow siblings, with the exception of Gamora, Glaive was disliked by Nebula.{{Ref|GotG}} ====[[Attack on the Statesman|Attack on the ''Statesman'']]==== [[File:CorvusGlaiveFirstScene.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Glaive standing guard over [[Loki]]]] Along with the rest of the [[Black Order]] and [[Thanos]], Glaive was present when they first attacked [[Xandar]] in search of the [[Power Stone]]. Thanos eventually stole the [[Orb]] from the [[Nova Corps Headquarters]] after defeating the [[Nova Corps]]. Eventually, the ''[[Sanctuary II]]'' had crossed paths with them in space with the [[Asgardians]] onboard of the ''[[Statesman]]''. [[File:BlackOrderBowsOverThanos.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Glaive humbly bows down to [[Thanos]]]] Together with Black Order, Glaive took part of Thanos' assault on the ''Statesman'' carrying the surviving Asgardians, as Thanos sought to secure the [[Space Stone]] from [[Loki]]. During the assault, Glaive was finishing off any wounded Asgardian that survived the attack before watching over Loki. As Loki was giving up the [[Tesseract]] to Thanos, [[Hulk]] violently attacked him. After Thanos defeated Hulk, Glaive lent his weapon to him to kill [[Heimdall]] who had used his powers to transport [[Hulk]] to [[Earth]]. [[File:Thanos & Black Order Teleport (Statesman).png|{{AltFloat}}|Glaive and the [[Black Order]] teleport away]] Once [[Thor]] was restrained by Maw, Thanos had acquired the [[Space Stone]] to his [[Infinity Gauntlet]] and ordered his children to retrieve two Infinity Stones on Earth, to which they bowed down to her knee in agreement. Loki then tried to distract them by telling Thanos that he would be an allegiance to him; however, he was then killed by his own hand. With the Space Stone secured, Thanos teleported himself and his children away from ''Statesman'' as it exploded.{{Ref|AIW}} ====[[Attack on Vision]]==== [[File:Corvus Glaive Impales Vision.png|{{AltFloat}}|Glaive violently impales [[Vision]] from behind]] {{Quote|Give up the [[Mind Stone|Stone]] and [[Wanda Maximoff|she]] lives.|Corvus Glaive to [[Vision]]|Avengers: Infinity War}} Glaive and [[Proxima Midnight]] traveled to [[Edinburgh]], [[Scotland]], in order to claim the [[Mind Stone]]. The pair found and ambushed [[Vision]] on his date with [[Wanda Maximoff]], having the android at the back of chest. After letting Vision go, Glaive encountered Maximoff before Midnight attacked her from behind. [[File:GlaiveTriesToOpenUpVision'sForehead.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Glaive tries to take away the [[Mind Stone]]]] After Glaive stabbed Vision through the back of his chest with his [[Corvus Glaive's Glaive|weapon]] and severely injuring the android to prevent him from phasing, he turned him around on the ground and proceeded to use his weapon to open up the Mind Stone from Vision's forehead, much to his trouble of getting him to submit. After Maximoff recovered from her attack, she blasted both Glaive and Midnight away, letting them both escape from the scenery. [[File:Vision vs. Corvus Glaive.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Glaive threatens [[Vision]] to give up the [[Mind Stone|Stone]]]] As Maximoff came to aid Vision's system wiring, Glaive fought Vision once he found them near a hallway, leading to him being flown away. Glaive engaged in aerial combat with Vision, breaking down to building to building as he kept on talking to Vision about giving up the Mind Stone or Maximoff will die. Vision pushed Glaive onto a building, leading to them crash on top of the rooftop. Glaive engaged in battle with Vision and pinned up to wall, enduring multiple attacks. [[File:Corvus glaives glaive deflect.PNG|{{AltFloat}}|Glaive deflects the energy blast from [[Vision]]]] After being thrown away, Glaive used his weapon to protect himself from the energy blast that Vision had produced. While reflecting the energy blast that is split into multiple lasers, Glaive targeted one of them to aim it at Vision, blasting him away. With Vision out in the open, Glaive used his weapon to open up his forehead to gain access of the Mind Stone. While trying to rip the Mind Stone off, Glaive was attacked by Maximoff, being blasted against the wall. [[File:Proximascarletcorvus.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Glaive corners [[Wanda Maximoff]] in the train station]] After Midnight sent a blast of energy from her [[Proxima Midnight's Spear|spear]] at the pair, knocking them out of the sky, and crashing into a train station, her and Glaive jumped through the roof, as Maximoff stood between them and Vision. To their surprise, however, a newcomer had emerged near the train tracks and caught Midnight's spear, revealing itself to be [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]]. Before the Black Order could react any further, [[Sam Wilson|Falcon]] flew toward Glaive, only to knock down Midnight from the battle. [[File:Corvus Glaive (2018).png|{{AltFloat}}|Glaive is gruesomely stabbed by [[Black Widow]]]] After Falcon sent a few rocket missiles from his [[EXO-7 Falcon|suit]], Glaive reflected all of them away with his weapon until [[Black Widow]] joined the battle against him. Once Black Widow caught the Spear, she stabbed Glaive in his abdomen, causing to scream in pain from his injury. During the fight, Glaive was seriously wounded while Midnight engaged in battle. After Midnight was defeated, Glaive noted that he was injured, leading to them to go back to their [[Q-Ship|ship]].{{Ref|AIW}} ====[[Battle of Wakanda]]==== [[File:8995CED7-8124-4C57-9D2B-C403BAB3E005.jpeg|{{AltFloat}}|Glaive sneaks into the [[Wakanda Medical Center]]]] {{Quote|Where's your other friend?"
"You will pay for his life with yours.|[[Black Widow]] and [[Proxima Midnight]]|Avengers: Infinity War}} Glaive recovered from his wounds and travelled with [[Proxima Midnight]] to [[Wakanda]]. Secretly he infiltrated [[Birnin Zana]] and made his way to the [[Wakanda Medical Center]] to ambush [[Vision]]. [[File:CGlaiveArrivesInsideTheWakandanLab.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Glaive defeats [[Shuri]]]] When [[Wanda Maximoff]] left Vision to join the [[Battle of Wakanda|battle]], Midnight signaled Glaive to enter the Center. Sneaking inside, Glaive defeated Wakandan [[Wakandan Royal Guard|guards]]. He was then confronted by [[Ayo]], but defeated her, and proceeded towards [[Shuri]], who tried to perform her operation for Vision. After Shuri shut down her operation, she attacked Glaive with her [[Vibranium Gauntlets]]. [[File:CGlaiveAttacksVisionInTheForest.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Glaive fighting against [[Vision]] in the forest]] Glaive destroyed the medical exam table and defeated Shuri, by keeping her off-balance, causing her to fall to the level below. Glaive then jumped to the level and looked around, before being tackled by an enraged Vision, who pushed them through the Center’s window into the forest below. After both of them had recovered from the fall, Glaive continued to kick Vision down on the ground until [[Cull Obsidian]] joined him. Once [[Bruce Banner]] in his [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLVIII|Mark XLVIII]] armor confronted them, Obsidian took Banner into another part of the forest. [[File:Infinity War 282.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Glaive manages to impale [[Vision]] again]] Engaging in a fight with Vision, Glaive gained the upper hand against, finally stabbing him in his abdomen, threatening him that he would die like any man. Desperate to keep Vision safe, [[Steve Rogers]] rushed to his aid and took over the fight. Rogers aggressively told Vision to leave the forest before engaging in a fight with Glaive. During the fight, Glaive got the upper hand on Rogers, but before he could kill him, his own blade was pushed through his chest. [[File:CorvusGlaiveDeath.png|{{AltFloat}}|Glaive being impaled by [[Vision]]]] Glaive gazed down at it protruding from his chest, as Vision raised him into the air while speared on his own blade, before dropping his lifeless body into the ground, thus ensuring that he was dead.{{Ref|AIW}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Superhuman Strength''': Glaive had considerable levels of superhuman strength. His physical strength allowed him to pin down the weakened [[Vision]] as well as overpower [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]] in hand-to-hand combat. *'''Superhuman Durability''': Glaive is much more resistant to physical damage than the body of a human being, allowing him to withstand the might of superhuman beings with ease. Glaive could withstand blows from [[Vision]], and a bolt of psionic energy from [[Wanda Maximoff]] which threw him through a wall and down a tower shaft. He was also able to endure being hit in the face with vibranium shields wielded by [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]] and was also able to endure being stabbed in the abdomen with [[Proxima Midnight's Spear]] by [[Black Widow]]. *'''Superhuman Speed''': Glaive possessed much greater speed and overall mobility compared to humans. During the [[Attack on Vision]], Glaive was capable of deflecting every missile [[Sam Wilson|Falcon]] sent at him. He was also able to hunt down and keep pace with Maximoff and Vision and fast enough to prevent Captain America from getting up during their fight and pin him down. He is also swift enough to deflect every sonic wave that is fired from [[Shuri]]'s [[Vibranium Gauntlets]]. However, it was still possible for Glaive to be taken off guard, such as when Black Widow ambushed Glaive. *'''Superhuman Agility''': Glaive was extremely agile during his fight with the already agile [[Vision]]. During the battle, he used many maneuvers to get the upper hand on Vision. *'''Superhuman Stamina''': Glaive fought for a very long time against [[Vision]] and even at one point, [[Wanda Maximoff]]. *'''Superhuman Reflexes''': Glaive was able to dodge many of [[Vision]]'s attacks. He was able to get his glaive in front of his face before Vision's laser attack hit. However, he could not dodge Vision's deadly blow from behind. *'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': After being wounded by [[Black Widow]] with [[Proxima Midnight]]'s spear, Glaive was able to fully recover in a matter of hours. ===Abilities=== *'''Master Combatant''': [[File:Corvus Glaive vs. Captain America.png|thumb|250px|Glaive fighting against [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]]]] Glaive was extensively trained by his adoptive father, [[Thanos]], and was highly accomplished in both armed and hand-to-hand combat. Hence, he managed to compete with the weakened Vision in their first fight, even gaining the upper hand after he reflected Vision's blast back at him, and later overpowered and stabbed him in their final fight. Glaive could also effortlessly slaughter two [[Wakanda]]n guards and overpower [[Ayo]]. In his fight with Captain America, Glaive was able to stand his ground against the world-class fighter and even managed to gain the upper hand despite Rogers disarming him, with only Vision interrupting the fight by killing Glaive with the latter's own [[Corvus Glaive's Glaive|weapon]]. {{Quote|The blade severed my vibranium tissue.|[[Vision]] to [[Wanda Maximoff]]|Avengers: Infinity War}} *'''Spear Mastery''': Glaive, as his name implies, was extremely proficient with a glaive, and used his glaive to stab, slash, and impale his enemies. He was also able to use it defensively to block a beam of energy from the [[Mind Stone]] fired by [[Vision]] and he was also able to deflect multiple sonic waves from Shuri's [[Vibranium Gauntlets|gauntlets]]. *'''Master Spy''': Glaive was able to stealthily infiltrate and enter the Wakandan laboratory where [[Vision]] was being kept. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== {{Quote|The blade, it stopped me from phasing.|[[Vision]] to [[Wanda Maximoff]]|Avengers: Infinity War}} *'''[[Corvus Glaive's Glaive|Glaive]]''': Corvus Glaive's main weapon is his blade. It is strong enough to stab through Vision's [[Vibranium]] body, as well as to block and scatter his [[Mind Stone]]-powered energy blast and the sonic waves from [[Shuri]]’s [[Vibranium Gauntlets]]. It can also prevent [[Vision]] from phasing after Corvus uses the Glaive to stab him. It was also used by Captain America to break Proxima Midnight's [[Proxima Midnight's Spear|spear]]. The blade was ultimately used by Vision to kill Glaive. ===Vehicles=== *'''''[[Sanctuary II]]''''': Corvus Glaive, along the rest of the [[Black Order]], used this massive warship to go to different places in the universe along [[Thanos]] and the army. They used this ship to [[Attack on the Statesman|assault]] the ''[[Statesman]]'' in [[2018]]. *'''''[[Statesman]]''''': Glaive boarded this massive ship along Thanos and the Black Order to obtain the [[Space Stone]]. After some fights, Thanos obtained the Stone, and they left the ship while it was destroyed by the [[Power Stone]]. *'''[[Q-Ship]]''': Corvus Glaive and [[Proxima Midnight]] used this ship to travel to [[Edinburgh]] in order to obtain the [[Mind Stone]]. He was hurt in the [[Attack on Vision|attack]] and Proxima Midnight's spear was destroyed. With no other options, he and Midnight retreated to this ship and fled to orbit to nurse their wounds. Later, they met [[Cull Obsidian]] in the ship and prepared for the [[Battle of Wakanda|final battle]] for the Mind Stone. *'''[[Outrider Dropship]]''': Glaive, Midnight and Obsidian used these ships to arrive on [[Wakanda]] before the [[Battle of Wakanda|battle]] but, unlike their partners, he went hidden in order to infiltrate the Wakanda's medical lab. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[A'Lars]] - Adoptive Grandfather *[[Starfox|Eros/Starfox]] - Adoptive Uncle *[[Thanos]] † - Adoptive Father and Master *[[Black Order]] - Adoptive Siblings and Teammates **[[Cull Obsidian]] † - Adoptive Brother **[[Proxima Midnight]] † - Adoptive Sister and Wife **[[Ebony Maw]] † - Adoptive Brother *[[Gamora]] † - Adoptive Sister and Rival *[[Nebula]] - Adoptive Sister and Rival ===Allies=== *[[Outriders]] - Subordinates {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Asgardians]] **[[Valkyrie|Brunnhilde/Valkyrie]] **[[Heimdall]] † **[[Einherjar]] *[[Sakaaran Rebellion]] **[[Korg]] **[[Miek]] **[[Biff (Rebellion)|Biff]] **[[Tasba]] **[[Roscoe]] † *[[Loki]] † *[[Avengers]] **[[Thor]] **[[Hulk|Bruce Banner/Hulk]] **[[Vision]] † - Attempted Victim and Killer **[[Wanda Maximoff]] † **[[Steve Rogers|Steve Rogers/Captain America]] - Attempted Victim **[[Black Widow|Natasha Romanoff/Black Widow]] † - Attempted Killer **[[Sam Wilson|Sam Wilson/Falcon]] *[[Wakandan Royal Guard]] *[[Golden Tribe]] **[[Shuri]] - Attempted Victim *[[Dora Milaje]] **[[Ayo]] - Attempted Victim {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|GotG}} (indirectly mentioned) *{{Appearance|AIW}} **{{Appearance|AEP1}} **{{Appearance|AEP2}} **{{Appearance|AEP3}} **{{Appearance|MDCCAIW}} *{{Appearance|LOftLG}} (mentioned) ==Trivia== *In the comics, '''Corvus Glaive''' was a member of [[Thanos]]' [[Black Order]] alongside his wife [[Proxima Midnight]] and his brother [[Cull Obsidian|Black Dwarf]], serving as Thanos' right-hand. *"Corvus" is Latin for "crow." ==Behind the Scenes== *An early note from ''[[The Story of Marvel Studios: The Making of the Marvel Cinematic Universe]]'' indicates that it was originally planned for Corvus Glaive to be killed by either [[Spider-Man]] or [[Star-Lord]], as the note itself reads "Peter kills Corvus Glaive".{{Ref|TSoMSTMotMCU}} *Concept art for ''[[Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings]]'' by [[Andrew Kim]] featured a virtual battle between Corvus Glaive and the [[Iron Man Armor: Mark XLVIII|Hulkbuster 2.0 Armor]].[https://www.andrewkimart.com/#/new-gallery-1/ Andrew Kim Art] ==References== {{Gallery|Corvus Glaive/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP}} *{{Marvel.com|characters/corvus-glaive}} [[ru:Корвус Глефа]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Avengers: Infinity War Characters]] [[Category:Comic Characters]] [[Category:Book Characters]] [[Category:Unknown Race]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:No Hair]] [[Category:Red Eyes]] [[Category:Black Order Members]] [[Category:High Body Count]] [[Category:Deceased Characters]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Vision]]
